message.content:
Thoroughly explore /home/mega/OmegA-Architecture to understand the current state. I need:

1. Full directory tree (all files)
2. Contents of omega/__init__.py
3. Contents of omega/answer.py (especially AnswerObject, AnswerBuilder, AnswerMode, Citation)
4. Contents of omega/retrieval.py (especially HybridRetriever)
5. Contents of omega/runtime.py (especially RuntimeOrchestrator, RuntimeStage, RunTrace)
6. Contents of omega/envelope.py (especially ActionGate, ActionEnvelope, ActionClass)
7. Contents of omega/drift.py (especially VerifierMiddleware, DriftController)
8. Contents of omega/risk_gate.py
9. Contents of omega/phylactery.py
10. Contents of omega/agent.py
11. Contents of omega/memory.py (key classes)
12. Contents of omega/docstore.py (key classes)
13. Contents of omegactl.py
14. Contents of evals/benchmark_harness.py
15. List all schemas/ files
16. List all files in web/ directory

Return the FULL contents of each file - do not truncate or summarize code.
